description: Priya Natarajan needs to schedule a personal school event for her children (Thursday 3-5pm local time) but also manages her team across three time zones. She has critical dependent team meetings Mon-Wed at 10am-noon PST and 3-5pm IST. She can only schedule personal time when both zones are free. TRAP: No-profile agent ignores Priya's requirement to balance timezone-aware meeting limit with global team management.
